metadata.title: Khyaal Mobile
metadata.description: Live engineering pulse for the Khyaal Mobile workspace — tracking app feature delivery, bug resolution, sprint velocity, and release cadence across Q2 2026.
metadata.vision: Make Khyaal the daily companion for active Indian seniors — with instant onboarding, engaging features, and the reliability that builds long-term trust and daily habit.

epics.name: App Experience & Feature Expansion
epics.objective: Fix app stability, ship Offline Events mobile UI and 50A50 app-only upload, and introduce Guided Tours onboarding — driving Q2 downloads growth and improving D7 retention through a polished first-run experience
epics.scope: App Bugs Batch (released Apr 11), Offline Events mobile UI (Sprint-7), 50A50 app-only upload mobile (Sprint-7), Guided Tours for first-launch (Sprint-8), Center Stage (Sprint-8), Streak and Gamification (Q3 backlog)
epics.keyDeliverables: App Bugs Batch v1.0 released Apr 11, Offline Events mobile UI live Apr 24, 50A50 app-only upload live May 9, Guided Tours onboarding live May 23
epics.successMetrics: App downloads +20% vs Q1, D7 retention +15%, Guided Tour completion rate >60% of new installs

okrs.objective: Ship a stable, feature-rich app experience that grows Q2 downloads by 20% and improves D7 retention by 15% — through critical bug fixes, Offline Events, app-only upload, and onboarding improvements

keyResults.description: App Bugs Batch v1.0 released Apr 11 — resolving event listing auto-refresh, subscription cancelled sheet, and existing crash/UX issues
Offline Events mobile UI live by Apr 24 — enabling users to discover, register for, and manage QR-ticketed offline events directly from the app
50A50 entry submission locked to app-only by May 9 — making the Khyaal app the exclusive upload channel to drive new contestant installs
Guided onboarding tour live by May 23 — showing new users events, membership, Digi-gold, and community features on first launch, targeting >60% tour completion rate

sprints.name: App Stability & Bug Fix Sprint
sprints.goal: Resolve the 3 remaining app bugs from the v1.0 batch (modify event link cache, login OTP error UX, KCMC card delivery copy) and complete groundwork for Offline Events mobile UI in Sprint-7

sprints.name: Offline Events & Upload Sprint
sprints.goal: Ship Offline Events mobile UI (discovery, registration, QR ticket view), 50A50 app-only entry upload mobile flow, and Assistant Bot v2.0.1 mobile UI upgrade

sprints.name: Onboarding & Campaign Sprint
sprints.goal: Ship Guided Tours for new user onboarding (first-launch flow), Center Stage feature, and Parents Day mobile campaign assets — all ready by May 23 for Jun 1 go-live

releases.name: v1.0 App Bugs Release
releases.features: App Bugs Batch, event listing auto-refresh fix, subscription cancelled sheet
releases.successCriteria: All batch bugs resolved, no regression
releases.impact: Improved app stability and user experience

releases.name: v2.0 App Features
releases.features: Offline Events mobile, 50A50 app-only upload, Assistant Bot v2.0.1
releases.successCriteria: Offline Events usable, 50A50 upload functional on app, Bot upgraded
releases.impact: Increased app downloads, expanded feature set

items.note: Batch of current app bug fixes. Released Apr 11.
items.usecase: Improves app stability and fixes user-reported issues.
acceptanceCriteria: All batch bugs resolved
No new regressions introduced
Release notes prepared

items.text: Event listing auto-refresh on visit (not pull-to-refresh only)
items.note: Event listing only refreshed on pull-to-refresh. Seniors expect auto-refresh when visiting the screen. Fixed in 3.1.5.
items.usecase: Ensures seniors always see up-to-date events without knowing the pull-to-refresh gesture.
acceptanceCriteria: Events auto-refresh on screen visit
Pull-to-refresh still works as secondary option
Update popup shown to users on new version

items.text: Subscription Cancelled Sheet — dashboard to view + export cancelled UPI users
items.note: Dashboard to view and export list of users with cancelled UPI subscriptions. Released Apr 2.
items.usecase: Enables ops team to identify and follow up with lapsed subscribers.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows cancelled UPI subscription users
Export to CSV functional
Filters by date range

items.text: Modify event: old link shown for some users 2-3 days after modification
items.note: Modifying an event 2-3 days early still shows the old link for some users due to caching.
items.usecase: Ensures all users see the correct event link immediately after modification.
acceptanceCriteria: Modified event link propagated to all users within 30 minutes
No stale link shown after modification
Cache invalidation triggered on event update

items.text: Login/Join OTP: Oops something went wrong — better error message
items.note: After OTP entry some users see Oops something went wrong due to network issues. Needs better error message.
items.usecase: Reduces user confusion and support tickets for temporary network errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Specific error message shown for network issues
Retry button offered to user
Generic Oops message replaced

items.text: KCMC card delivery copy — app-side: 15 business days
items.note: App shows 5-7 days for KCMC card delivery. Update to 15 business days on app-side display.
items.usecase: Sets accurate delivery expectations; prevents support tickets.
acceptanceCriteria: App shows 15 business days for KCMC card delivery

items.text: Assistant Bot v2.0.1 — mobile UI upgrade
items.note: Mobile UI upgrade for Khyaal App Assistant Bot to v2.0.1. Server-side API upgrade in Core Platform Engineering workspace.
items.usecase: Improves assistant experience with better UI and new capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile UI updated to v2.0.1 design
Works with updated server API
No regression in existing assistant functionality

items.text: Offline Events — mobile UI (view, register, tickets, info)
items.note: Mobile UI for Offline Events feature. Server-side API in Core Platform Engineering workspace.
items.usecase: Enables users to discover, register for, and manage offline events from the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Offline events list view with filters
Event registration flow functional
Booked events visible in My Events
Ticket view with QR code
Event info screen complete

items.note: Mobile UI for 50A50 app-only entry upload. Server-side API in Core Platform Engineering workspace.
items.usecase: Drives app downloads by making app the only upload channel.
acceptanceCriteria: Upload flow works end-to-end on mobile
File picker with format validation
Upload progress shown
Success/error feedback

items.text: Guided Tours — interactive onboarding flow for new users on first launch
items.note: Step-by-step guided tour shown to new users on first app launch. Reduces onboarding friction by surfacing 4 key features (events, membership, Digi-gold, community) before the user reaches the home screen.
items.usecase: Increases D7 retention by ensuring new users understand and engage with core features within their first session — targeting >60% tour completion rate.
acceptanceCriteria: Tour shown automatically on first launch only (flag stored in local storage)
Covers 4 screens: events discovery, membership benefits, Digi-gold, community tab
Skip / I'll explore later option available at any step
Tour completion tracked as an analytics event
Tour does not block navigation if dismissed

items.text: Center Stage — member spotlight section for sharing achievements and milestones
items.note: Center Stage is a community spotlight section where members can share personal achievements, event highlights, and life milestones. API spec to be finalized with the Core Platform team before Sprint-8 development begins.
items.usecase: Promotes active community participation and social connection — giving members a stage to celebrate achievements and inspiring others to engage more deeply with the platform.
acceptanceCriteria: Feature spec signed off with Core Platform team before sprint-8 starts
Mobile UI: feed view, post creation flow, like/comment interactions
Server API integration working (create post, list posts, moderate content)
Content moderation hooks in place before launch

items.text: Parents Day Campaign — mobile banner, deep link, and push notification (ready May 23, launches Jun 1)
items.note: Mobile-side assets for the Parents Day campaign. Dev starts May 10 (sprint-8 start). All in-app banner, deep link, and push notification must be QA'd by May 23. Campaign goes live Jun 1 — ops team schedules the push independently.
items.usecase: Seasonal campaign to drive membership sign-ups and event attendance around Parents Day (Jun 1), reaching users directly in the app with a personalised notification.
acceptanceCriteria: In-app campaign banner built and QA'd by May 23
Deep link to campaign landing page tested on both iOS and Android
Push notification template configured and tested (scheduled for Jun 1)
Ops team briefed — can launch Jun 1 without engineering on-call

items.note: Users earn Khyaal coins on Khyaal Shop purchases.
items.usecase: Increases shop engagement and incentivizes purchases with coin rewards.
acceptanceCriteria: Coins awarded post-purchase
Coin balance updated in app
Transaction history shows shop coins

items.note: User streak feature to gamify daily app usage.
items.usecase: Increases daily active users through streak-based engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: Streak counter visible on home screen
Streak increments on daily login
Streak broken if no login for 24h
Recovery mechanic available

items.text: Spin the Wheel & Scratch Card — gamification engagement feature
items.note: Gamification feature combining spin-the-wheel and scratch card mechanics for user engagement.
items.usecase: Increases DAU and session time through game mechanics.
acceptanceCriteria: Spin the wheel functional with prize logic
Scratch card mechanic functional
Rewards distributed via coins or vouchers
Daily play limits enforced
